key_uncertainties: whether moderate capacity + yield + cost formula holds through 2027
2025-Q1.mgmt_statement_summary: Reaffirms Perfecta as the operating frame: 20% adjusted EPS CAGR through 2027 and high-teens ROIC, driven by moderate capacity growth, moderate yield growth, and strong cost control.

status_delta.detail: first quarter this asset appears in the lifecycle record

2025-Q2.mgmt_statement_summary: Positions Perfecta as a milestone rather than the ceiling of ambition; analyst probing on whether $5B CapEx and new-build/non-new-build mix is the right shape for 2026-2027.

key_uncertainties: execution risk on game-changing ship pipeline
2025-Q3.mgmt_statement_summary: Reiterates on-track status for 2027 Perfecta targets; previews a Post-Perfecta step change driven by new ships, destinations, AI commercial platforms, and disciplined capital.

key_uncertainties: sustaining 20% CAGR after two years at 23%
2025-Q4.mgmt_statement_summary: 23% adjusted EPS CAGR over the first two years of Perfecta keeps the company on track for 2027 targets; framed again as a milestone, not the endpoint.

key_uncertainties: fuel and TUI JV headwinds offsetting Perfecta progression in near term
2026-Q1.mgmt_statement_summary: On-track restatement of 20% adjusted EPS CAGR through 2027 and high-teens ROIC under the Perfecta performance program.

asked_by_history.framing: CapEx shape inside Perfecta: is $5B/yr (with current new-build vs non-new-build mix) the right run-rate for 2026 and 2027?

primary_framings_observed: Perfecta as the 2027 financial scorecard (EPS CAGR, ROIC)
CapEx and capital allocation envelope implied by the plan
Perfecta as milestone vs. Post-Perfecta ambition

currently_open_questions_as_of_2026Q1: Will FY2026 absorb the TUI JV and fuel headwinds without compromising the 20% adjusted EPS CAGR trajectory?
What is the Post-Perfecta financial framework (targets, time horizon, capital intensity)?
Is the implied CapEx envelope through 2027 still ~$5B/yr and how is it split between new-builds and destinations/fleet modernization?
How much of Perfecta upside is structural (destinations, AI commercial platforms) vs. cyclical pricing?
